title: Cast Task Schema
description: Experimental schema for a standalone cast.task remote definition.

description.description: A description of what the task does.

inputs.description: Inputs required or optional for the task to execute.

default.description: Default value if the input is not provided.

required.description: Whether this input must be provided by the caller.

runs.description: Defines how the task is executed.

using.description: The execution engine to use. Common values are `docker`, `deno`, `composite`, `bash`, and `sh`; custom strings are allowed for experimental runners.

image.description: The Docker image to use when `using: docker`.

args.description: Arguments to pass to the execution engine.

main.description: The main script file to execute when `using: deno` or `using: bun`.
